name: Effectiveness of VR-Based Two-Way Staircase Light Switching Compared to Traditional Laboratory Practice
summary: The proposed system is a Virtual Reality–based electrical laboratory application designed to simulate two-way staircase fluorescent light switching using Unity and XR technologies. The system enables students to perform wire connections, interact with switches, and control staircase lighting inside an immersive VR environment, providing safe and interactive practical learning without physical laboratory equipment.
